[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100110001 5
1 1111001011 7
2 1010110001 5
3 1011010100 5
4 0100000010 2
5 1001100010 4
6 0000000000 a
7 0000000000 a

56 1011010100 5 match 3
67 0100000000 1
70 0001100000 2
